---
title: "About This Site"
---

This site was built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) as part of a lab assignment at the Singapore Institute of Technology.

## Purpose

This is a personal portfolio site to showcase my work, learning journey, and projects throughout my studies.

## How It's Built

The site uses:

- **Quarto** for authoring and rendering
- **GitHub Pages** for hosting
- The **Cosmo** Bootstrap theme

## A Quick Demo

Here's a simple R example to show the site can run live code:

```{r}
#| label: demo
summary(cars)
```
